customSupportSubtitle: Our team helps you deploy the platform and prepare your certifications.
faq1Q: What is included for free with the marketplace?
faq1A: Every transaction on Le Comptoir Circulaire automatically includes blockchain traceability, transaction CO₂ calculation, a downloadable PDF traceability certificate, and access to the transactional carbon dashboard. All included in the marketplace commission.
faq2Q: What is the difference between the free dashboard and the ESG subscription?
faq2A: The free dashboard shows the carbon impact of your marketplace transactions (CO₂ avoided through recycling). The ESG subscription adds a complete company carbon footprint (Scope 1, 2, 3), a data entry form for your energy/transport/purchasing data, an auto-generated CSRD/GRI compliant ESG report, and personalized recommendations.
faq3A: Traceability is at the core of our value proposition. Every material exchanged on the platform is automatically traced and hashed. This ensures transparency, builds trust between buyers and sellers, and automatically feeds your ESG reporting.
faq4Q: How does the 14-day free trial work?
faq4A: You get access to all features of your plan for 14 days without any payment. At the end of the trial period, your card will be charged the chosen monthly or annual amount. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends.
faq5Q: Can I generate carbon credits with your platform?
faq5A: Yes, as part of the Enterprise plan. The platform automates the methodology, certification, and tracking of your carbon credits from your circular economy activities.
ctaTitle: Ready to turn your waste into a competitive advantage?
ctaSubtitle: Join companies that combine economic performance and positive environmental impact.
comparisonSub: Pick at a glance. All numbers and inclusions per plan.
